sEn: We can train an agent entirely inside its own hallucinated dream generated by its world model and transfer the policy back to the actual environment.
sZh: 我们可以在世界模型生成的幻觉梦境中完全训练智能体，并将策略迁移回真实环境。
absEn: We explore building generative neural network models of popular reinforcement learning environments. Our world model can be trained quickly in an unsupervised manner to learn a compressed spatial and temporal representation of the environment. By using features extracted from the world model as inputs to an agent, we can train a very compact and simple policy that can solve the required task. We can even train our agent entirely inside of its own hallucinated dream generated by its world model, and transfer this policy back into the actual environment. An interactive version of this paper is available at https://worldmodels.github.io/
absZh: 我们探索构建流行强化学习环境的生成式神经网络模型。我们的世界模型可以通过无监督方式快速训练，学习环境的压缩时空表征。通过将世界模型提取的特征作为智能体的输入，我们可以训练一个非常紧凑且简单的策略来解决所需任务。我们甚至可以在世界模型生成的幻觉梦境中完全训练智能体，并将该策略迁移回实际环境。本文的交互式版本可在 https://worldmodels.github.io/ 获取。

contrib.en: Proposes a world model framework with VAE and MDN-RNN for unsupervised learning of compressed spatial-temporal representations.
contrib.zh: 提出一个由VAE和MDN-RNN组成的世界模型框架，用于无监督学习压缩的时空表征。

contrib.en: Demonstrates training a compact linear controller using features from the world model to solve continuous control tasks.
contrib.zh: 展示利用世界模型特征训练紧凑线性控制器以解决连续控制任务。

contrib.en: Shows agent can be trained entirely inside a hallucinated dream environment and transfer policy to the real environment.
contrib.zh: 展示智能体可在完全由世界模型生成的梦境环境中训练，并将策略迁移到真实环境。

contrib.en: Uses temperature parameter in MDN-RNN to control uncertainty and prevent adversarial policy exploitation.
contrib.zh: 利用MDN-RNN的温度参数控制不确定性，防止对抗性策略的利用。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art results on CarRacing-v0 and VizDoom tasks with simple evolutionary optimization.
contrib.zh: 在CarRacing-v0和VizDoom任务上通过简单进化优化取得最先进结果。

contrib.en: Provides an interactive online version of the paper for hands-on exploration.
contrib.zh: 提供论文的交互式在线版本，便于动手探索。

limits.en: World model may encode task-irrelevant details due to unsupervised training.
limits.zh: 由于无监督训练，世界模型可能编码与任务无关的细节。

limits.en: Limited capacity of LSTM-based world model may cause catastrophic forgetting.
limits.zh: 基于LSTM的世界模型容量有限，可能导致灾难性遗忘。

limits.en: Controller can exploit imperfections in the world model, leading to policies that fail in the real environment.
limits.zh: 控制器可能利用世界模型的不完美，导致策略在真实环境中失败。

limits.en: Method relies on random policy data collection, which may be insufficient for complex environments.
limits.zh: 方法依赖随机策略数据收集，对于复杂环境可能不足。

limits.en: No hierarchical planning or abstract reasoning; simulates futures step by step.
limits.zh: 缺乏分层规划或抽象推理，仅逐步模拟未来。

items.en: We explore building generative neural network models of popular reinforcement learning environments. Our world model can be trained quickly in an unsupervised manner to learn a compressed spatial and temporal representation of the environment. By using features extracted from the world model as inputs to an agent, we can train a very compact and simple policy that can solve the required task. We can even train our agent entirely inside of its own hallucinated dream generated by its world model, and transfer this policy back into the actual environment. An interactive version of this paper is available at https://worldmodels.github.io
items.zh: 我们探索构建流行强化学习环境的生成式神经网络模型。我们的世界模型可以以无监督方式快速训练，学习环境的压缩时空表示。通过将世界模型提取的特征作为智能体的输入，我们可以训练一个非常紧凑且简单的策略来解决所需任务。我们甚至可以在世界模型生成的幻觉梦境中完全训练智能体，并将该策略迁移回实际环境。本文的交互版本可在 https://worldmodels.github.io 获取。

items.en: Humans develop a mental model of the world based on what they are able to perceive with their limited senses. The decisions and actions we make are based on this internal model. Jay Wright Forrester, the father of system dynamics, described a mental model as:
items.zh: 人类基于其有限感官所能感知的内容，发展出对世界的心理模型。我们所做的决策和行动都基于这一内部模型。系统动力学之父杰伊·赖特·福瑞斯特将心理模型描述为：

items.en: The image of the world around us, which we carry in our head, is just a model. Nobody in his head imagines all the world, government or country. He has only selected concepts, and relationships between them, and uses those to represent the real system. (Forrester, 1971)
items.zh: “我们脑海中携带的周围世界的图像只是一个模型。没有人能在脑海中想象整个世界、政府或国家。他只有选择的概念以及它们之间的关系，并用这些来代表真实系统。”（福瑞斯特，1971）

items.capEn: Figure 1: A World Model, from Scott McCloud’s Understanding Comics. (McCloud, 1993; E, 2012)
items.capZh: 图1：世界模型，来自斯科特·麦克劳德的《理解漫画》。（麦克劳德，1993；E，2012）

items.en: To handle the vast amount of information that flows through our daily lives, our brain learns an abstract representation of both spatial and temporal aspects of this information. We are able to observe a scene and remember an abstract description thereof (Cheang & Tsao, 2017; Quiroga et al., 2005). Evidence also suggests that what we perceive at any given moment is governed by our brain’s prediction of the future based on our internal model (Nortmann et al., 2015; Gerrit et al., 2013).
items.zh: 为了处理日常生活中涌入的大量信息，我们的大脑学会了这些信息在空间和时间方面的抽象表示。我们能够观察一个场景并记住其抽象描述（Cheang & Tsao, 2017; Quiroga et al., 2005）。也有证据表明，我们在任何特定时刻所感知的内容，受大脑基于内部模型对未来预测的支配（Nortmann et al., 2015; Gerrit et al., 2013）。

items.en: One way of understanding the predictive model inside of our brains is that it might not be about just predicting the future in general, but predicting future sensory data given our current motor actions (Keller et al., 2012; Leinweber et al., 2017). We are able to instinctively act on this predictive model and perform fast reflexive behaviours when we face danger (Mobbs et al., 2015), without the need to consciously plan out a course of action.
items.zh: 理解我们大脑内部预测模型的一种方式是，它可能不仅仅是一般性地预测未来，而是根据我们当前的运动动作预测未来的感官数据（Keller et al., 2012; Leinweber et al., 2017）。我们能够本能地基于该预测模型行动，并在面对危险时执行快速反射行为（Mobbs et al., 2015），而无需有意识地规划行动过程。

items.en: Take baseball for example. A batter has milliseconds to decide how they should swing the bat – shorter than the time it takes for visual signals to reach our brain. The reason we are able to hit a 100 mph fastball is due to our ability to instinctively predict when and where the ball will go. For professional players, this all happens subconsciously. Their muscles reflexively swing the bat at the right time and location in line with their internal models’ predictions (Gerrit et al., 2013). They can quickly act on their predictions of the future without the need to consciously roll out possible future scenarios to form a plan (Hirshon, 2013).
items.zh: 以棒球为例。击球手只有几毫秒的时间来决定如何挥棒——这比视觉信号到达大脑所需的时间还要短。我们能够击中时速100英里的快球，是因为我们能够本能地预测球何时何地会到达。对于职业球员来说，这一切都在潜意识中发生。他们的肌肉根据内部模型的预测，在正确的时间和位置反射性地挥棒（Gerrit et al., 2013）。他们能够快速基于对未来的预测采取行动，而无需有意识地展开可能的未来情景来制定计划（Hirshon, 2013）。

items.capEn: Figure 2: What we see is based on our brain’s prediction of the future (Kitaoka, 2002; Watanabe et al., 2018).
items.capZh: 图2：我们所看到的内容基于大脑对未来的预测（Kitaoka, 2002; Watanabe et al., 2018）。

items.en: In many reinforcement learning (RL) problems (Kaelbling et al., 1996; Sutton & Barto, 1998; Wiering & van Otterlo, 2012), an artificial agent also benefits from having a good representation of past and present states, and a good predictive model of the future (Werbos, 1987; Silver, 2017), preferably a powerful predictive model implemented on a general purpose computer such as a recurrent neural network (RNN) (Schmidhuber, 1990a, b, 1991a).
items.zh: 在许多强化学习问题中（Kaelbling et al., 1996; Sutton & Barto, 1998; Wiering & van Otterlo, 2012），人工智能体也受益于对过去和当前状态的良好表示，以及对未来的良好预测模型（Werbos, 1987; Silver, 2017），最好是实现于通用计算机上的强大预测模型，例如循环神经网络（Schmidhuber, 1990a, b, 1991a）。

items.capEn: Figure 3: In this work, we build probabilistic generative models of OpenAI Gym environments. The RNN-based world models are trained using collected observations recorded from the actual game environment. After training the world models, we can use them mimic the complete environment and train agents using them.
items.capZh: 图3：在这项工作中，我们构建了OpenAI Gym环境的概率生成模型。基于RNN的世界模型使用从实际游戏环境中收集的观测记录进行训练。训练世界模型后，我们可以用它们模拟完整环境，并训练智能体。

items.en: Large RNNs are highly expressive models that can learn rich spatial and temporal representations of data. However, many model-free RL methods in the literature often only use small neural networks with few parameters. The RL algorithm is often bottlenecked by the credit assignment problem, which makes it hard for traditional RL algorithms to learn millions of weights of a large model, hence in practice, smaller networks are used as they iterate faster to a good policy during training.
items.zh: 大型RNN是高度表达性的模型，可以学习数据的丰富时空表示。然而，文献中许多无模型强化学习方法通常只使用参数较少的小型神经网络。强化学习算法常常受限于信用分配问题，这使得传统强化学习算法难以学习大型模型的数百万权重，因此实践中使用较小的网络，因为它们在训练过程中能更快地迭代到良好的策略。

items.en: Ideally, we would like to be able to efficiently train large RNN-based agents. The backpropagation algorithm (Linnainmaa, 1970; Kelley, 1960; Werbos, 1982) can be used to train large neural networks efficiently. In this work we look at training a large neural network111Typical model-free RL models have in the order of 103superscript10310^{3} to 106superscript10610^{6} model parameters. We look at training models in the order of 107superscript10710^{7} parameters, which is still rather small compared to state-of-the-art deep learning models with 108superscript10810^{8} to even 109superscript10910^{9} parameters. In principle, the procedure described in this article can take advantage of these larger networks if we wanted to use them. to tackle RL tasks, by dividing the agent into a large world model and a small controller model. We first train a large neural network to learn a model of the agent’s world in an unsupervised manner, and then train the smaller controller model to learn to perform a task using this world model. A small controller lets the training algorithm focus on the credit assignment problem on a small search space, while not sacrificing capacity and expressiveness via the larger world model. By training the agent through the lens of its world model, we show that it can learn a highly compact policy to perform its task.
items.zh: 理想情况下，我们希望能够高效地训练基于RNN的大型智能体。反向传播算法（Linnainmaa, 1970; Kelley, 1960; Werbos, 1982）可用于高效训练大型神经网络。在这项工作中，我们通过将智能体分为大型世界模型和小型控制器模型，来训练大型神经网络以解决强化学习任务。我们首先以无监督方式训练一个大型神经网络来学习智能体世界的模型，然后训练较小的控制器模型，利用这个世界模型学习执行任务。小型控制器使训练算法能够专注于小搜索空间上的信用分配问题，同时通过更大的世界模型不牺牲容量和表达性。通过在世界模型的视角下训练智能体，我们展示了它可以学习到高度紧凑的策略来执行任务。

items.en: Although there is a large body of research relating to model-based reinforcement learning, this article is not meant to be a review (Arulkumaran et al., 2017; Schmidhuber, 2015b) of the current state of the field. Instead, the goal of this article is to distill several key concepts from a series of papers 1990–2015 on combinations of RNN-based world models and controllers (Schmidhuber, 1990a, b, 1991a, c, 2015a). We will also discuss other related works in the literature that share similar ideas of learning a world model and training an agent using this model.
items.zh: 尽管有大量关于基于模型的强化学习的研究，本文并非旨在对该领域的当前状态进行综述（Arulkumaran et al., 2017; Schmidhuber, 2015b）。相反，本文的目标是从1990-2015年间一系列关于基于RNN的世界模型和控制器组合的论文中提炼几个关键概念（Schmidhuber, 1990a, b, 1991a, c, 2015a）。我们还将讨论文献中其他共享学习世界模型并使用该模型训练智能体这一类似思想的相关工作。

items.en: In this article, we present a simplified framework that we can use to experimentally demonstrate some of the key concepts from these papers, and also suggest further insights to effectively apply these ideas to various RL environments. We use similar terminology and notation as On Learning to Think: Algorithmic Information Theory for Novel Combinations of RL Controllers and RNN World Models (Schmidhuber, 2015a) when describing our methodology and experiments.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一个简化的框架，用于实验性地展示这些论文中的一些关键概念，并建议进一步洞见以有效地将这些思想应用于各种强化学习环境。在描述我们的方法和实验时，我们使用与《论学习思考：用于强化学习控制器和RNN世界模型新组合的算法信息论》（Schmidhuber, 2015a）类似的术语和符号。

items.en: We present a simple model inspired by our own cognitive system. In this model, our agent has a visual sensory component that compresses what it sees into a small representative code. It also has a memory component that makes predictions about future codes based on historical information. Finally, our agent has a decision-making component that decides what actions to take based only on the representations created by its vision and memory components.
items.zh: 我们提出了一个受自身认知系统启发的简单模型。在该模型中，我们的智能体有一个视觉感官组件，将其所见压缩成一个小型代表性编码。它还有一个记忆组件，基于历史信息预测未来的编码。最后，我们的智能体有一个决策组件，仅基于其视觉和记忆组件创建的表示来决定采取什么行动。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Our agent consists of three components that work closely together: Vision (V), Memory (M), and Controller (C)
items.capZh: 图4：我们的智能体由三个紧密协作的组件组成：视觉（V）、记忆（M）和控制器（C）

items.en: The environment provides our agent with a high dimensional input observation at each time step. This input is usually a 2D image frame that is part of a video sequence. The role of the V model is to learn an abstract, compressed representation of each observed input frame.
items.zh: 环境在每个时间步为智能体提供高维输入观测。该输入通常是视频序列中的二维图像帧。V模型的作用是学习每个观测输入帧的抽象、压缩表示。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Flow diagram of a Variational Autoencoder (VAE).
items.capZh: 图5：变分自编码器的流程图。

items.en: Here, we use a simple Variational Autoencoder (Kingma & Welling, 2013; Rezende et al., 2014) as our V model to compress each image frame into a small latent vector z𝑧z.
items.zh: 这里，我们使用一个简单的变分自编码器（Kingma & Welling, 2013; Rezende et al., 2014）作为我们的V模型，将每个图像帧压缩成一个小型潜在向量z。

items.en: While it is the role of the V model to compress what the agent sees at each time frame, we also want to compress what happens over time. For this purpose, the role of the M model is to predict the future. The M model serves as a predictive model of the future z𝑧z vectors that V is expected to produce. Since many complex environments are stochastic in nature, we train our RNN to output a probability density function p​(z)𝑝𝑧p(z) instead of a deterministic prediction of z𝑧z.
items.zh: 虽然V模型的作用是压缩智能体在每个时间帧所见的内容，但我们还想压缩随时间发生的内容。为此，M模型的作用是预测未来。M模型作为V模型预期产生的未来z向量的预测模型。由于许多复杂环境本质上是随机的，我们训练RNN输出概率密度函数p(z)而不是z的确定性预测。

items.capEn: Figure 6: RNN with a Mixture Density Network output layer. The MDN outputs the parameters of a mixture of Gaussian distribution used to sample a prediction of the next latent vector z𝑧z.
items.capZh: 图6：带有混合密度网络输出层的RNN。MDN输出混合高斯分布的参数，用于对下一个潜变量z的预测进行采样。

items.en: In our approach, we approximate p​(z)𝑝𝑧p(z) as a mixture of Gaussian distribution, and train the RNN to output the probability distribution of the next latent vector zt+1subscript𝑧𝑡1z_{t+1} given the current and past information made available to it.
items.zh: 在我们的方法中，我们将p(z)近似为混合高斯分布，并训练RNN根据当前及过去的信息输出下一个潜变量z_{t+1}的概率分布。

items.en: More specifically, the RNN will model P​(zt+1|at,zt,ht)𝑃conditionalsubscript𝑧𝑡1subscript𝑎𝑡subscript𝑧𝑡subscriptℎ𝑡P(z_{t+1}\;|\;a_{t},z_{t},h_{t}), where atsubscript𝑎𝑡a_{t} is the action taken at time t𝑡t and htsubscriptℎ𝑡h_{t} is the hidden state of the RNN at time t𝑡t. During sampling, we can adjust a temperature parameter τ𝜏\tau to control model uncertainty, as done in (Ha & Eck, 2017) – we will find adjusting τ𝜏\tau to be useful for training our controller later on.
items.zh: 更具体地说，RNN将对P(z_{t+1} | a_t, z_t, h_t)进行建模，其中a_t是在时间t采取的动作，h_t是RNN在时间t的隐藏状态。在采样过程中，我们可以调整温度参数τ来控制模型不确定性，如(Ha & Eck, 2017)中所做的那样——我们发现调整τ对于后续训练控制器很有用。

items.capEn: Figure 7: SketchRNN (Ha & Eck, 2017) is an example of a MDN-RNN used to predict the next pen strokes of a sketch drawing. We use a similar model to predict the next latent vector ztsubscript𝑧𝑡z_{t}.
items.capZh: 图7：SketchRNN (Ha & Eck, 2017) 是一个MDN-RNN的例子，用于预测素描的下一个笔触。我们使用类似的模型来预测下一个潜变量z_t。

items.en: This approach is known as a Mixture Density Network (Bishop, 1994) combined with a RNN (MDN-RNN) (Graves, 2013; Ha, 2017a), and has been applied in the past for sequence generation problems such as generating handwriting (Graves, 2013) and sketches (Ha & Eck, 2017).
items.zh: 这种方法被称为混合密度网络 (Bishop, 1994) 与RNN的结合 (MDN-RNN) (Graves, 2013; Ha, 2017a)，并已应用于序列生成问题，如生成手写 (Graves, 2013) 和素描 (Ha & Eck, 2017)。

items.en: The Controller (C) model is responsible for determining the course of actions to take in order to maximize the expected cumulative reward of the agent during a rollout of the environment. In our experiments, we deliberately make C as simple and small as possible, and trained separately from V and M, so that most of our agent’s complexity resides in the world model (V and M).
items.zh: 控制器 (C) 模型负责确定动作序列，以在环境展开过程中最大化智能体的期望累积奖励。在我们的实验中，我们故意使C尽可能简单和小型化，并与V和M分开训练，以便我们智能体的大部分复杂性存在于世界模型 (V和M) 中。

items.en: C is a simple single layer linear model that maps ztsubscript𝑧𝑡z_{t} and htsubscriptℎ𝑡h_{t} directly to action atsubscript𝑎𝑡a_{t} at each time step:
items.zh: C是一个简单的单层线性模型，在每个时间步将z_t和h_t直接映射到动作a_t：

items.en: In this linear model, Wcsubscript𝑊𝑐W_{c} and bcsubscript𝑏𝑐b_{c} are the weight matrix and bias vector that maps the concatenated input vector [zt​ht]delimited-[]subscript𝑧𝑡subscriptℎ𝑡[z_{t}\;h_{t}] to the output action vector atsubscript𝑎𝑡a_{t}.
items.zh: 在这个线性模型中，W_c和b_c是权重矩阵和偏置向量，将拼接后的输入向量 [z_t; h_t] 映射到输出动作向量a_t。

full.sec: 2.4 Putting V, M, and C Together

items.en: The following flow diagram illustrates how V, M, and C interacts with the environment:
items.zh: 以下流程图说明了V、M和C如何与环境交互：

items.capEn: Figure 8: Flow diagram of our Agent model. The raw observation is first processed by V at each time step t𝑡t to produce ztsubscript𝑧𝑡z_{t}. The input into C is this latent vector ztsubscript𝑧𝑡z_{t} concatenated with M’s hidden state htsubscriptℎ𝑡h_{t} at each time step. C will then output an action vector atsubscript𝑎𝑡a_{t} for motor control, and will affect the environment. M will then take the current ztsubscript𝑧𝑡z_{t} and action atsubscript𝑎𝑡a_{t} as an input to update its own hidden state to produce ht+1subscriptℎ𝑡1h_{t+1} to be used at time t+1𝑡1t+1.
items.capZh: 图8：我们智能体模型的流程图。在每个时间步t，原始观测首先由V处理以生成z_t。C的输入是每个时间步的潜向量z_t与M的隐藏状态h_t的拼接。C随后输出动作向量a_t用于运动控制，并影响环境。M随后将当前的z_t和动作a_t作为输入，更新其隐藏状态以生成h_{t+1}，供时间t+1使用。

items.zh: 在给定的控制器C上运行此函数将返回一次展开期间的累积奖励。

items.en: This minimal design for C also offers important practical benefits. Advances in deep learning provided us with the tools to train large, sophisticated models efficiently, provided we can define a well-behaved, differentiable loss function. Our V and M models are designed to be trained efficiently with the backpropagation algorithm using modern GPU accelerators, so we would like most of the model’s complexity, and model parameters to reside in V and M. The number of parameters of C, a linear model, is minimal in comparison. This choice allows us to explore more unconventional ways to train C – for example, even using evolution strategies (ES) (Rechenberg, 1973; Schwefel, 1977) to tackle more challenging RL tasks where the credit assignment problem is difficult.
items.zh: 这种C的最小化设计还带来了重要的实际好处。深度学习的进步为我们提供了高效训练大型复杂模型的工具，前提是我们能定义一个良好行为、可微的损失函数。我们的V和M模型设计为使用现代GPU加速器通过反向传播算法高效训练，因此我们希望模型的大部分复杂性和参数位于V和M中。相比之下，C（线性模型）的参数数量极少。这一选择使我们能够探索更非常规的训练C的方法——例如，甚至使用进化策略 (ES) (Rechenberg, 1973; Schwefel, 1977) 来解决信用分配问题困难的更具挑战性的强化学习任务。

items.en: To optimize the parameters of C, we chose the Covariance-Matrix Adaptation Evolution Strategy (CMA-ES) (Hansen, 2016; Hansen & Ostermeier, 2001) as our optimization algorithm since it is known to work well for solution spaces of up to a few thousand parameters. We evolve parameters of C on a single machine with multiple CPU cores running multiple rollouts of the environment in parallel.
items.zh: 为了优化C的参数，我们选择协方差矩阵自适应进化策略 (CMA-ES) (Hansen, 2016; Hansen & Ostermeier, 2001) 作为优化算法，因为它已知在最多几千个参数的解空间中表现良好。我们在单台机器上并行运行多个环境展开，使用多个CPU核心来进化C的参数。

items.en: For more specific information about the models, training procedures, and environments used in our experiments, please refer to the Appendix section.
items.zh: 关于模型、训练程序和实验所用环境的更具体信息，请参考附录部分。

items.en: In this section, we describe how we can train the Agent model described earlier to solve a car racing task. To our knowledge, our agent is the first known solution to achieve the score required to solve this task.222We find this task interesting because although it is not difficult to train an agent to wobble around randomly generated tracks and obtain a mediocre score, CarRacing-v0 defines solving as getting average reward of 900 over 100 consecutive trials, which means the agent can only afford very few driving mistakes.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们描述如何训练前面描述的智能体模型来解决赛车任务。据我们所知，我们的智能体是第一个已知达到解决该任务所需分数的解决方案。222我们发现这个任务很有趣，因为虽然训练一个智能体在随机生成的赛道上蹒跚而行并获得中等分数并不困难，但CarRacing-v0将解决定义为在连续100次试验中平均奖励达到900，这意味着智能体只能犯很少的驾驶错误。

full.secZh: 3.1 用于特征提取的世界模型

items.en: A predictive world model can help us extract useful representations of space and time. By using these features as inputs of a controller, we can train a compact and minimal controller to perform a continuous control task, such as learning to drive from pixel inputs for a top-down car racing environment called CarRacing-v0 (Klimov, 2016).
items.zh: 预测性世界模型可以帮助我们提取有用的空间和时间表示。通过将这些特征用作控制器的输入，我们可以训练一个紧凑且最小的控制器来执行连续控制任务，例如从像素输入学习驾驶，用于一个名为CarRacing-v0 (Klimov, 2016) 的俯视赛车环境。

items.capEn: Figure 9: Our agent learning to navigate in CarRacing-v0.
items.capZh: 图9：我们的智能体在CarRacing-v0中学习导航。

items.en: In this environment, the tracks are randomly generated for each trial, and our agent is rewarded for visiting as many tiles as possible in the least amount of time. The agent controls three continuous actions: steering left/right, acceleration, and brake.
items.zh: 在这个环境中，每次试验的赛道都是随机生成的，我们的智能体因在最短时间内访问尽可能多的瓷砖而获得奖励。智能体控制三个连续动作：左/右转向、加速和刹车。

items.en: To train our V model, we first collect a dataset of 10,000 random rollouts of the environment. We have first an agent acting randomly to explore the environment multiple times, and record the random actions atsubscript𝑎𝑡a_{t} taken and the resulting observations from the environment. We use this dataset to train V to learn a latent space of each frame observed. We train our VAE to encode each frame into low dimensional latent vector z𝑧z by minimizing the difference between a given frame and the reconstructed version of the frame produced by the decoder from z𝑧z.
items.zh: 为了训练我们的V模型，我们首先收集了10,000次随机环境展开的数据集。我们首先让一个智能体随机行动多次探索环境，并记录所采取的随机动作a_t以及从环境得到的观测结果。我们使用这个数据集训练V来学习每帧观测的潜空间。我们训练VAE将每帧编码为低维潜向量z，通过最小化给定帧与解码器从z重建的帧之间的差异。

items.en: We can now use our trained V model to pre-process each frame at time t𝑡t into ztsubscript𝑧𝑡z_{t} to train our M model. Using this pre-processed data, along with the recorded random actions atsubscript𝑎𝑡a_{t} taken, our MDN-RNN can now be trained to model P​(zt+1|at,zt,ht)𝑃conditionalsubscript𝑧𝑡1subscript𝑎𝑡subscript𝑧𝑡subscriptℎ𝑡P(z_{t+1}\;|\;a_{t},z_{t},h_{t}) as a mixture of Gaussians.333In principle, we can train both models together in an end-to-end manner, although we found that training each separately is more practical, and also achieves satisfactory results. Training each model only required less than an hour of computation time on a single GPU. We can also train individual VAE and MDN-RNN models without having to exhaustively tune hyperparameters.
items.zh: 现在我们可以使用训练好的 V 模型对每个时间步 t 的帧进行预处理，得到 z_t，以训练 M 模型。利用这些预处理数据以及记录的随机动作 a_t，我们的 MDN-RNN 可以训练为将 P(z_{t+1} | a_t, z_t, h_t) 建模为高斯混合模型。原则上，我们可以端到端地同时训练两个模型，但我们发现分别训练更实用，并且也能取得令人满意的结果。每个模型的训练在单个 GPU 上只需不到一小时的计算时间。我们还可以单独训练 VAE 和 MDN-RNN 模型，而无需详尽地调整超参数。

items.en: In this experiment, the world model (V and M) has no knowledge about the actual reward signals from the environment. Its task is simply to compress and predict the sequence of image frames observed. Only the Controller (C) Model has access to the reward information from the environment. Since there are a mere 867 parameters inside the linear controller model, evolutionary algorithms such as CMA-ES are well suited for this optimization task.
items.zh: 在这个实验中，世界模型（V 和 M）对环境中的实际奖励信号一无所知。它的任务仅仅是压缩和预测观察到的图像帧序列。只有控制器（C）模型能够访问环境的奖励信息。由于线性控制器模型内仅有 867 个参数，CMA-ES 等进化算法非常适合此优化任务。

items.en: We can use the VAE to reconstruct each frame using ztsubscript𝑧𝑡z_{t} at each time step to visualize the quality of the information the agent actually sees during a rollout. The figure below is a VAE model trained on screenshots from CarRacing-v0.
items.zh: 我们可以使用 VAE 在每个时间步利用 z_t 重建每一帧，以可视化智能体在 rollout 过程中实际看到的信息质量。下图是在 CarRacing-v0 的截图上训练的 VAE 模型。

items.capEn: Figure 10: Despite losing details during this lossy compression process, latent vector z𝑧z captures the essence of each image frame.
items.capZh: 图 10：尽管在此有损压缩过程中丢失了细节，但潜在向量 z 捕捉到了每个图像帧的精华。

items.en: In the online version of this article, one can load randomly chosen screenshots to be encoded into a small latent vector z𝑧z, which is used to reconstruct the original screenshot. One can also experiment with adjusting the values of the z𝑧z vector using the slider bars to see how it affects the reconstruction, or randomize z𝑧z to observe the space of possible screenshots.
items.zh: 在本文的在线版本中，可以加载随机选择的截图，将其编码为小的潜在向量 z，然后用于重建原始截图。还可以通过滑块调整 z 向量的值，观察其对重建的影响，或随机化 z 以观察可能截图的空间。

items.en: To summarize the Car Racing experiment, below are the steps taken:
items.zh: 总结 Car Racing 实验，步骤如下：

items.en: Collect 10,000 rollouts from a random policy.
items.zh: 从随机策略收集 10,000 次 rollout。

items.en: Train VAE (V) to encode frames into z∈ℛ32𝑧superscriptℛ32z\in\mathcal{R}^{32}.
items.zh: 训练 VAE（V）将帧编码为 z ∈ R^{32}。

items.en: Train MDN-RNN (M) to model P​(zt+1|at,zt,ht)𝑃conditionalsubscript𝑧𝑡1subscript𝑎𝑡subscript𝑧𝑡subscriptℎ𝑡P(z_{t+1}\;|\;a_{t},z_{t},h_{t}).
items.zh: 训练 MDN-RNN（M）建模 P(z_{t+1} | a_t, z_t, h_t)。

items.en: Define Controller (C) as at=Wc​[zt​ht]+bcsubscript𝑎𝑡subscript𝑊𝑐delimited-[]subscript𝑧𝑡subscriptℎ𝑡subscript𝑏𝑐a_{t}=W_{c}\;[z_{t}\;h_{t}]\;+\;b_{c}.
items.zh: 将控制器（C）定义为 a_t = W_c [z_t; h_t] + b_c。

items.en: Use CMA-ES to solve for a Wcsubscript𝑊𝑐W_{c} and bcsubscript𝑏𝑐b_{c} that maximizes the expected cumulative reward.
items.zh: 使用 CMA-ES 求解最大化期望累积奖励的 W_c 和 b_c。

items.en: Training an agent to drive is not a difficult task if we have a good representation of the observation. Previous works (Hünermann, 2017; Bling, 2015; Lau, 2016) have shown that with a good set of hand-engineered information about the observation, such as LIDAR information, angles, positions and velocities, one can easily train a small feed-forward network to take this hand-engineered input and output a satisfactory navigation policy. For this reason, we first want to test our agent by handicapping C to only have access to V but not M, so we define our controller as at=Wc​zt+bcsubscript𝑎𝑡subscript𝑊𝑐subscript𝑧𝑡subscript𝑏𝑐a_{t}=W_{c}\;z_{t}\;+\;b_{c}.
items.zh: 如果我们对观测有良好的表示，训练智能体驾驶并非难事。先前的工作（Hünermann, 2017; Bling, 2015; Lau, 2016）表明，利用一组精心手工设计的观测信息（如激光雷达信息、角度、位置和速度），可以轻松训练一个小型前馈网络，以这些手工输入输出满意的导航策略。因此，我们首先通过限制 C 只能访问 V 而不能访问 M 来测试智能体，因此我们将控制器定义为 a_t = W_c z_t + b_c。

items.capEn: Figure 11: Limiting our controller to see only ztsubscript𝑧𝑡z_{t}, but not htsubscriptℎ𝑡h_{t} results in wobbly and unstable driving behaviours.
items.capZh: 图 11：将控制器限制为仅看到 z_t 而不看到 h_t 会导致驾驶行为摇摆不定且不稳定。

items.en: Although the agent is still able to navigate the race track in this setting, we notice it wobbles around and misses the tracks on sharper corners. This handicapped agent achieved an average score of 632 ±plus-or-minus\pm 251 over 100 random trials, in line with the performance of other agents on OpenAI Gym’s leaderboard (Klimov, 2016) and traditional Deep RL methods such as A3C (Khan & Elibol, 2016; Jang et al., 2017). Adding a hidden layer to C’s policy network helps to improve the results to 788 ±plus-or-minus\pm 141, but not quite enough to solve this environment.
items.zh: 尽管智能体在此设置下仍能导航赛道，但我们注意到它会左右摇摆，并在急弯处偏离赛道。此受限智能体在 100 次随机试验中平均得分为 632 ± 251，与 OpenAI Gym 排行榜上其他智能体的表现（Klimov, 2016）以及 A3C 等传统深度强化学习方法（Khan & Elibol, 2016; Jang et al., 2017）相当。在 C 的策略网络中添加一个隐藏层有助于将结果提升至 788 ± 141，但还不足以解决此环境。

items.en: The representation ztsubscript𝑧𝑡z_{t} provided by our V model only captures a representation at a moment in time and does not have much predictive power. In contrast, M is trained to do one thing, and to do it really well, which is to predict zt+1subscript𝑧𝑡1z_{t+1}. Since M’s prediction of zt+1subscript𝑧𝑡1z_{t+1} is produced from the RNN’s hidden state htsubscriptℎ𝑡h_{t} at time t𝑡t, this vector is a good candidate for the set of learned features we can give to our agent. Combining ztsubscript𝑧𝑡z_{t} with htsubscriptℎ𝑡h_{t} gives our controller C a good representation of both the current observation, and what to expect in the future.
items.zh: 我们的 V 模型提供的表示 z_t 仅捕捉了某一时刻的表示，没有太多预测能力。相比之下，M 被训练做一件事，并且做得非常好，即预测 z_{t+1}。由于 M 对 z_{t+1} 的预测是由时间 t 的 RNN 隐藏状态 h_t 产生的，因此该向量是我们可以提供给智能体的一组学习特征的良好候选。将 z_t 与 h_t 结合，为我们的控制器 C 提供了当前观测和未来预期的良好表示。

items.capEn: Figure 12: Driving is more stable if we give our controller access to both ztsubscript𝑧𝑡z_{t} and htsubscriptℎ𝑡h_{t}.
items.capZh: 图 12：如果让控制器同时访问 z_t 和 h_t，驾驶会更加稳定。

items.en: We see that allowing the agent to access the both ztsubscript𝑧𝑡z_{t} and htsubscriptℎ𝑡h_{t} greatly improves its driving capability. The driving is more stable, and the agent is able to seemingly attack the sharp corners effectively. Furthermore, we see that in making these fast reflexive driving decisions during a car race, the agent does not need to plan ahead and roll out hypothetical scenarios of the future. Since htsubscriptℎ𝑡h_{t} contain information about the probability distribution of the future, the agent can just query the RNN instinctively to guide its action decisions. Like a seasoned Formula One driver or the baseball player discussed earlier, the agent can instinctively predict when and where to navigate in the heat of the moment.
items.zh: 我们看到，允许智能体同时访问 z_t 和 h_t 大大提高了其驾驶能力。驾驶更加稳定，智能体似乎能够有效地应对急弯。此外，我们注意到，在赛车过程中做出这些快速反射性驾驶决策时，智能体不需要提前规划并展开未来的假设情景。由于 h_t 包含未来概率分布的信息，智能体可以本能地查询 RNN 来指导其行动决策。就像经验丰富的一级方程式赛车手或前面讨论的棒球运动员一样，智能体可以在关键时刻本能地预测何时何地导航。

items.en: Our agent is able to achieve a score of 906 ±plus-or-minus\pm 21 over 100 random trials, effectively solving the task and obtaining new state of the art results. Previous attempts (Khan & Elibol, 2016; Jang et al., 2017) using Deep RL methods obtained average scores of 591–652 range, and the best reported solution on the leaderboard obtained an average score of 838 ±plus-or-minus\pm 11 over 100 random trials. Traditional Deep RL methods often require pre-processing of each frame, such as employing edge-detection (Jang et al., 2017), in addition to stacking a few recent frames (Khan & Elibol, 2016; Jang et al., 2017) into the input. In contrast, our world model takes in a stream of raw RGB pixel images and directly learns a spatial-temporal representation. To our knowledge, our method is the first reported solution to solve this task.
items.zh: 我们的智能体在 100 次随机试验中得分达到 906 ± 21，有效解决了任务并取得了新的最优结果。先前使用深度强化学习方法（Khan & Elibol, 2016; Jang et al., 2017）的尝试平均得分在 591–652 范围内，而排行榜上报告的最佳解决方案在 100 次随机试验中平均得分为 838 ± 11。传统的深度强化学习方法通常需要对每一帧进行预处理，例如使用边缘检测（Jang et al., 2017），以及将最近几帧堆叠（Khan & Elibol, 2016; Jang et al., 2017）作为输入。相比之下，我们的世界模型接收原始 RGB 像素图像流，并直接学习时空表示。据我们所知，我们的方法是第一个报告解决此任务的方法。

items.en: Since our world model is able to model the future, we are also able to have it come up with hypothetical car racing scenarios on its own. We can ask it to produce the probability distribution of zt+1subscript𝑧𝑡1z_{t+1} given the current states, sample a zt+1subscript𝑧𝑡1z_{t+1} and use this sample as the real observation. We can put our trained C back into this hallucinated environment generated by M. The following image from an interactive demo in the online version of this article shows how our world model can be used to hallucinate the car racing environment:
items.zh: 由于我们的世界模型能够建模未来，我们还可以让它自行生成假设的赛车场景。我们可以要求它根据当前状态生成 z_{t+1} 的概率分布，采样一个 z_{t+1} 并将此样本用作真实观测。我们可以将训练好的 C 放回由 M 生成的这个幻觉环境中。以下来自本文在线版本交互式演示的图像展示了我们的世界模型如何用于幻觉赛车环境：

items.capEn: Figure 13: Our agent driving inside of its own dream world. Here, we deploy our trained policy into a fake environment generated by the MDN-RNN, and rendered using the VAE’s decoder. In the demo, one can override the agent’s actions as well as adjust τ𝜏\tau to control the uncertainty of the environment generated by M.
items.capZh: 图 13：我们的智能体在自己的梦境世界中驾驶。在这里，我们将训练好的策略部署到由 MDN-RNN 生成的虚假环境中，并使用 VAE 的解码器进行渲染。在演示中，用户可以覆盖智能体的动作，并调整 τ 以控制 M 生成环境的不确定性。

items.en: We have just seen that a policy learned inside of the real environment appears to somewhat function inside of the dream environment. This begs the question – can we train our agent to learn inside of its own dream, and transfer this policy back to the actual environment?
items.zh: 我们刚刚看到，在真实环境中习得的策略似乎在梦境环境中也能发挥作用。这引出了一个问题——我们能否训练智能体在自己的梦境中学习，并将这一策略迁移回实际环境？

items.en: If our world model is sufficiently accurate for its purpose, and complete enough for the problem at hand, we should be able to substitute the actual environment with this world model. After all, our agent does not directly observe the reality, but only sees what the world model lets it see. In this experiment, we train an agent inside the hallucination generated by its world model trained to mimic a VizDoom (Kempka et al., 2016) environment.
items.zh: 如果我们的世界模型在其目的上足够准确，并且对于当前问题足够完整，我们应该能够用这个世界模型替代实际环境。毕竟，我们的智能体并不直接观察现实，而只能看到世界模型让它看到的东西。在本实验中，我们训练一个智能体在其世界模型生成的幻觉中进行学习，该世界模型经过训练以模仿VizDoom环境（Kempka等人，2016）。

items.capEn: Figure 14: Our final agent solving VizDoom: Take Cover.
items.capZh: 图14：我们的最终智能体解决VizDoom：Take Cover。

items.en: The agent must learn to avoid fireballs shot by monsters from the other side of the room with the sole intent of killing the agent. There are no explicit rewards in this environment, so to mimic natural selection, the cumulative reward can be defined to be the number of time steps the agent manages to stay alive during a rollout. Each rollout of the environment runs for a maximum of 2100 time steps (∼similar-to\sim 60 seconds), and the task is considered solved if the average survival time over 100 consecutive rollouts is greater than 750 time steps (∼similar-to\sim 20 seconds) (Paquette, 2016).
items.zh: 智能体必须学会躲避房间另一侧怪物发射的火球，这些怪物的唯一意图是杀死智能体。该环境中没有显式奖励，因此为了模仿自然选择，累积奖励可以定义为智能体在一次展开中存活的时间步数。每次环境展开最多运行2100个时间步（约60秒），如果连续100次展开的平均存活时间超过750个时间步（约20秒），则认为任务被解决（Paquette，2016）。

items.en: The setup of our VizDoom experiment is largely the same as the Car Racing task, except for a few key differences. In the Car Racing task, M is only trained to model the next ztsubscript𝑧𝑡z_{t}. Since we want to build a world model we can train our agent in, our M model here will also predict whether the agent dies in the next frame (as a binary event d​o​n​et𝑑𝑜𝑛subscript𝑒𝑡done_{t}, or dtsubscript𝑑𝑡d_{t} for short), in addition to the next frame ztsubscript𝑧𝑡z_{t}.
items.zh: 我们的VizDoom实验设置与Car Racing任务大致相同，除了一些关键差异。在Car Racing任务中，M仅被训练来建模下一个z_t。由于我们希望构建一个可以在其中训练智能体的世界模型，这里的M模型除了预测下一帧z_t外，还将预测智能体是否在下一帧死亡（作为二元事件done_t，或简写为d_t）。

items.en: Since the M model can predict the d​o​n​e𝑑𝑜𝑛𝑒done state in addition to the next observation, we now have all of the ingredients needed to make a full RL environment. We first build an OpenAI Gym environment interface by wrapping a gym.Env interface over our M if it were a real Gym environment, and then train our agent inside of this virtual environment instead of using the actual environment.
items.zh: 由于M模型除了预测下一个观测外还能预测done状态，我们现在拥有了构建完整RL环境所需的所有要素。我们首先通过将gym.Env接口封装到我们的M上（就像它是一个真正的Gym环境一样）来构建一个OpenAI Gym环境接口，然后在这个虚拟环境中训练我们的智能体，而不是使用实际环境。

items.en: In this simulation, we do not need the V model to encode any real pixel frames during the hallucination process, so our agent will therefore only train entirely in a latent space environment. This has many advantages as we will see.
items.zh: 在此模拟中，我们不需要V模型在幻觉过程中编码任何实际像素帧，因此我们的智能体将完全在潜在空间环境中进行训练。这将带来许多优势，我们将会看到。

items.en: This virtual environment has an identical interface to the real environment, so after the agent learns a satisfactory policy in the virtual environment, we can easily deploy this policy back into the actual environment to see how well the policy transfers over.
items.zh: 这个虚拟环境具有与实际环境相同的接口，因此当智能体在虚拟环境中习得满意的策略后，我们可以轻松地将该策略部署回实际环境，以观察策略的迁移效果。

items.en: To summarize the Take Cover experiment, below are the steps taken:
items.zh: 总结Take Cover实验，步骤如下：

items.en: Collect 10,000 rollouts from a random policy.
items.zh: 从随机策略收集10,000次展开。

items.en: Train VAE (V) to encode each frame into a latent vector z∈ℛ64𝑧superscriptℛ64z\in\mathcal{R}^{64}, and use V to convert the images collected from (1) into the latent space representation.
items.zh: 训练VAE（V）将每一帧编码为潜在向量z∈ℛ^64，并使用V将（1）中收集的图像转换为潜在空间表示。

items.en: Train MDN-RNN (M) to model P​(zt+1,dt+1|at,zt,ht)𝑃subscript𝑧𝑡1conditionalsubscript𝑑𝑡1subscript𝑎𝑡subscript𝑧𝑡subscriptℎ𝑡P(z_{t+1},d_{t+1}\;|\;a_{t},z_{t},h_{t}).
items.zh: 训练MDN-RNN（M）以建模P(z_{t+1}, d_{t+1} | a_t, z_t, h_t)。

items.en: Define Controller (C) as at=Wc​[zt​ht]subscript𝑎𝑡subscript𝑊𝑐delimited-[]subscript𝑧𝑡subscriptℎ𝑡a_{t}=W_{c}\;[z_{t}\;h_{t}].
items.zh: 将控制器（C）定义为a_t = W_c [z_t; h_t]。

items.en: Use CMA-ES to solve for a Wcsubscript𝑊𝑐W_{c} that maximizes the expected survival time inside the virtual environment.
items.zh: 使用CMA-ES求解最大化虚拟环境内期望存活时间的W_c。

items.en: Use learned policy from (5) on actual environment.
items.zh: 将（5）中习得的策略应用于实际环境。

items.en: After some training, our controller learns to navigate around the dream environment and escape from deadly fireballs launched by monsters generated by M. Our agent achieved a score of ∼similar-to\sim 900 time steps in the virtual environment.
items.zh: 经过一些训练，我们的控制器学会了在梦境环境中导航，并躲避由M生成的怪物发射的致命火球。我们的智能体在虚拟环境中达到了约900个时间步的分数。

items.capEn: Figure 15: Our agent discovers a policy to avoid hallucinated fireballs. In the online version of this article, the reader can interact with the environment inside this demo.
items.capZh: 图15：我们的智能体发现了一种避免幻觉火球的策略。在本文的在线版本中，读者可以在此演示中与环境互动。

items.en: Here, our RNN-based world model is trained to mimic a complete game environment designed by human programmers. By learning only from raw image data collected from random episodes, it learns how to simulate the essential aspects of the game – such as the game logic, enemy behaviour, physics, and also the 3D graphics rendering.
items.zh: 在这里，我们基于RNN的世界模型被训练来模仿由人类程序员设计的完整游戏环境。仅通过从随机回合收集的原始图像数据学习，它学会了如何模拟游戏的基本方面——例如游戏逻辑、敌人行为、物理以及3D图形渲染。

items.en: For instance, if the agent selects the left action, the M model learns to move the agent to the left and adjust its internal representation of the game states accordingly. It also learns to block the agent from moving beyond the walls on both sides of the level if the agent attempts to move too far in either direction. Occasionally, the M model needs to keep track of multiple fireballs being shot from several different monsters and coherently move them along in their intended directions. It must also detect whether the agent has been killed by one of these fireballs.
items.zh: 例如，如果智能体选择向左动作，M模型学会将智能体向左移动并相应调整其游戏状态的内部表示。它还学会在智能体试图向任一方向移动过远时，阻止智能体穿过关卡两侧的墙壁。有时，M模型需要跟踪多个怪物发射的多个火球，并连贯地将它们沿预定方向移动。它还必须检测智能体是否被其中一个火球杀死。

items.en: Unlike the actual game environment, however, we note that it is possible to add extra uncertainty into the virtual environment, thus making the game more challenging in the dream environment. We can do this by increasing the temperature τ𝜏\tau parameter during the sampling process of zt+1subscript𝑧𝑡1z_{t+1}. By increasing the uncertainty, our dream environment becomes more difficult compared to the actual environment. The fireballs may move more randomly in a less predictable path compared to the actual game. Sometimes the agent may even die due to sheer misfortune, without explanation.
items.zh: 然而，与实际游戏环境不同，我们注意到可以在虚拟环境中增加额外的不确定性，从而使梦境环境中的游戏更具挑战性。我们可以通过在z_{t+1}的采样过程中增加温度τ参数来实现这一点。通过增加不确定性，我们的梦境环境变得比实际环境更困难。火球可能以更随机的方式移动，路径比实际游戏更不可预测。有时智能体甚至可能因纯粹的不幸而死亡，毫无解释。

items.en: We find agents that perform well in higher temperature settings generally perform better in the normal setting. In fact, increasing τ𝜏\tau helps prevent our controller from taking advantage of the imperfections of our world model – we will discuss this in more depth later on.
items.zh: 我们发现，在较高温度设定下表现良好的智能体通常在正常设定下也表现更好。实际上，提高τ有助于防止我们的控制器利用世界模型的不完美之处——我们将在后文更深入地讨论这一点。

full.secZh: 4.4 将策略迁移到实际环境

items.capEn: Figure 16: Deploying our policy learned inside of the dream RNN environment back into the actual VizDoom environment.
items.capZh: 图16：将在梦境RNN环境中学习到的策略部署回实际的VizDoom环境中。

items.en: We took the agent trained inside of the virtual environment and tested its performance on the original VizDoom scenario. The score over 100 random consecutive trials is ∼similar-to\sim 1100 time steps, far beyond the required score of 750 time steps, and also much higher than the score obtained inside the more difficult virtual environment.
items.zh: 我们将虚拟环境中训练的智能体在原始VizDoom场景中测试其性能。在100次随机连续试验中，得分约为1100时间步，远超所需的750时间步，也远高于在更困难的虚拟环境中获得的得分。

items.capEn: Figure 17: An interactive VAE of Doom in the online article.
items.capZh: 图17：在线文章中的交互式VAE（Doom）。

items.en: We see that even though the V model is not able to capture all of the details of each frame correctly, for instance, getting the number of monsters correct, the agent is still able to use the learned policy to navigate in the real environment. As the virtual environment cannot even keep track of the exact number of monsters in the first place, an agent that is able to survive the noisier and uncertain virtual nightmare environment will thrive in the original, cleaner environment.
items.zh: 我们看到，尽管V模型无法正确捕捉每一帧的所有细节（例如，怪物数量正确），智能体仍然能够使用学习到的策略在真实环境中导航。由于虚拟环境本身无法准确追踪怪物数量，能够在更嘈杂、更不确定的虚拟噩梦环境中生存的智能体，将在更干净的原始环境中茁壮成长。

items.en: In our childhood, we may have encountered ways to exploit video games in ways that were not intended by the original game designer (Wikipedia, 2017). Players discover ways to collect unlimited lives or health, and by taking advantage of these exploits, they can easily complete an otherwise difficult game. However, in the process of doing so, they may have forfeited the opportunity to learn the skill required to master the game as intended by the game designer.
items.zh: 在我们的童年时期，我们可能遇到过以游戏设计师未预期的方式利用视频游戏漏洞的方法（Wikipedia, 2017）。玩家发现收集无限生命或健康值的方法，通过利用这些漏洞，他们可以轻松完成原本困难的游戏。然而，在此过程中，他们可能放弃了学习游戏设计师所期望的掌握游戏技能的机会。

items.en: For instance, in our initial experiments, we noticed that our agent discovered an adversarial policy to move around in such a way so that the monsters in this virtual environment governed by the M model never shoots a single fireball during some rollouts. Even when there are signs of a fireball forming, the agent will move in a way to extinguish the fireballs magically as if it has superpowers in the environment.
items.zh: 例如，在最初的实验中，我们注意到智能体发现了一种对抗性策略，即通过移动方式使得由M模型控制的虚拟环境中的怪物在某些回合中从不发射火球。即使有火球形成的迹象，智能体也会以某种方式移动，神奇地熄灭火球，仿佛它在环境中拥有超能力。

items.en: Because our world model is only an approximate probabilistic model of the environment, it will occasionally generate trajectories that do not follow the laws governing the actual environment. As we saw previously, even the number of monsters on the other side of the room in the actual environment is not exactly reproduced by the world model. Like a child who learns that objects in the air usually fall to the ground, the child might also imagine unrealistic superheroes who fly across the sky. For this reason, our world model will be exploitable by the controller, even if in the actual environment such exploits do not exist.
items.zh: 因为我们的世界模型只是环境的近似概率模型，它偶尔会生成不遵循实际环境规律的轨迹。正如我们之前所见，世界模型甚至无法精确再现实际环境中房间另一侧的怪物数量。就像一个孩子知道空中的物体通常会落到地面，但也会想象出飞越天空的超现实超级英雄。因此，我们的世界模型会被控制器利用，即使在实际环境中并不存在这样的漏洞。

items.en: And since we are using the M model to generate a virtual dream environment for our agent, we are also giving the controller access to all of the hidden states of M. This is essentially granting our agent access to all of the internal states and memory of the game engine, rather than only the game observations that the player gets to see. Therefore our agent can efficiently explore ways to directly manipulate the hidden states of the game engine in its quest to maximize its expected cumulative reward. The weakness of this approach of learning a policy inside a learned dynamics model is that our agent can easily find an adversarial policy that can fool our dynamics model – it’ll find a policy that looks good under our dynamics model, but will fail in the actual environment, usually because it visits states where the model is wrong because they are away from the training distribution.
items.zh: 由于我们使用M模型为智能体生成虚拟梦境环境，我们也让控制器访问M的所有隐藏状态。这本质上相当于让智能体访问游戏引擎的所有内部状态和记忆，而不仅仅是玩家能看到的游戏观察结果。因此，智能体可以高效地探索直接操纵游戏引擎隐藏状态的方法，以最大化其期望累积奖励。这种在学习的动力学模型内部学习策略的方法的弱点是，智能体很容易找到能够欺骗动力学模型的对抗性策略——它会找到一个在动力学模型下看起来不错但在实际环境中会失败的策略，通常是因为它访问了模型错误的、远离训练分布的状态。

items.capEn: Figure 18: Agent discovers an adversarial policy to automatically extinguish fireballs after they are fired during some rollouts.
items.capZh: 图18：智能体发现了一种对抗性策略，在某些回合中火球发射后自动将其熄灭。

items.en: This weakness could be the reason that many previous works that learn dynamics models of RL environments but do not actually use those models to fully replace the actual environments (Oh et al., 2015; Chiappa et al., 2017). Like in the M model proposed in (Schmidhuber, 1990a, b, 1991a), the dynamics model is a deterministic model, making the model easily exploitable by the agent if it is not perfect. Using Bayesian models, as in PILCO (Deisenroth & Rasmussen, 2011), helps to address this issue with the uncertainty estimates to some extent, however, they do not fully solve the problem. Recent work (Nagabandi et al., 2017) combines the model-based approach with traditional model-free RL training by first initializing the policy network with the learned policy, but must subsequently rely on model-free methods to fine-tune this policy in the actual environment.
items.zh: 这一弱点可能是许多先前学习RL环境动力学模型但并未实际使用这些模型完全替代实际环境的工作（Oh et al., 2015; Chiappa et al., 2017）的原因。就像（Schmidhuber, 1990a, b, 1991a）提出的M模型一样，动力学模型是确定性模型，使得模型在非完美情况下容易被智能体利用。使用贝叶斯模型（如PILCO（Deisenroth & Rasmussen, 2011））在一定程度上通过不确定性估计解决了这个问题，但并未完全解决。最近的工作（Nagabandi et al., 2017）将基于模型的方法与传统无模型RL训练相结合，首先用学习到的策略初始化策略网络，但随后必须依赖无模型方法在实际环境中微调该策略。

items.en: In Learning to Think (Schmidhuber, 2015a), it is acceptable that the RNN M is not always a reliable predictor. A (potentially evolution-based) RNN C can in principle learn to ignore a flawed M, or exploit certain useful parts of M for arbitrary computational purposes including hierarchical planning etc. This is not what we do here though – our present approach is still closer to some of the older systems (Schmidhuber, 1990a, b, 1991a), where a RNN M is used to predict and plan ahead step by step. Unlike this early work, however, we use evolution for C (like in Learning to Think) rather than traditional RL combined with RNNs, which has the advantage of both simplicity and generality.
items.zh: 在《学习思考》（Schmidhuber, 2015a）中，RNN M并非总是可靠的预测器，这是可以接受的。一个（可能基于进化的）RNN C原则上可以学会忽略有缺陷的M，或利用M的某些有用部分进行任意计算目的，包括分层规划等。但这并非我们此处所做的——我们当前的方法仍然更接近一些较旧的系统（Schmidhuber, 1990a, b, 1991a），其中RNN M用于逐步预测和规划。然而，与早期工作不同，我们对C使用进化（如《学习思考》中）而非传统RL结合RNN，这具有简单性和通用性的优势。

items.en: To make it more difficult for our C model to exploit deficiencies of the M model, we chose to use the MDN-RNN as the dynamics model, which models the distribution of possible outcomes in the actual environment, rather than merely predicting a deterministic future. Even if the actual environment is deterministic, the MDN-RNN would in effect approximate it as a stochastic environment. This has the advantage of allowing us to train our C model inside a more stochastic version of any environment – we can simply adjust the temperature parameter τ𝜏\tau to control the amount of randomness in the M model, hence controlling the tradeoff between realism and exploitability.
items.zh: 为了增加C模型利用M模型缺陷的难度，我们选择使用MDN-RNN作为动力学模型，该模型对实际环境中可能结果的分布进行建模，而不仅仅是预测确定性未来。即使实际环境是确定性的，MDN-RNN实际上也会将其近似为随机环境。这使我们能够在任何环境的更随机版本中训练C模型——我们可以简单地调整温度参数τ来控制M模型中的随机性量，从而控制真实性与可利用性之间的权衡。

items.en: Using a mixture of Gaussian model may seem like overkill given that the latent space encoded with the VAE model is just a single diagonal Gaussian distribution. However, the discrete modes in a mixture density model is useful for environments with random discrete events, such as whether a monster decides to shoot a fireball or stay put. While a single diagonal Gaussian might be sufficient to encode individual frames, a RNN with a mixture density output layer makes it easier to model the logic behind a more complicated environment with discrete random states.
items.zh: 使用混合高斯模型可能看起来有些过度，因为VAE模型编码的潜在空间只是单个对角高斯分布。然而，混合密度模型中的离散模式对于具有随机离散事件的环境（例如怪物决定发射火球还是保持不动）非常有用。虽然单个对角高斯分布可能足以编码单个帧，但具有混合密度输出层的RNN使得对具有离散随机状态的更复杂环境的逻辑进行建模更加容易。

items.en: For instance, if we set the temperature parameter to a very low value of τ=0.1𝜏0.1\tau=0.1, effectively training our C model with a M model that is almost identical to a deterministic LSTM, the monsters inside this dream environment fail to shoot fireballs, no matter what the agent does, due to mode collapse. The M model is not able to jump to another mode in the mixture of Gaussian model where fireballs are formed and shot. Whatever policy learned inside of this dream will achieve a perfect score of 2100 most of the time, but will obviously fail when unleashed into the harsh reality of the actual world, underperforming even a random policy.
items.zh: 例如，如果将温度参数设置为非常低的值τ=0.1，实际上使用几乎等同于确定性LSTM的M模型训练C模型，那么由于模式崩溃，无论智能体做什么，这个梦境环境中的怪物都不会发射火球。M模型无法跳转到混合高斯模型中火球形成和发射的另一个模式。在此梦境中学习到的任何策略大多数时候都会获得2100的完美分数，但显然在释放到现实世界的严酷现实中会失败，甚至不如随机策略。

items.en: Note again, however, that the simpler and more robust approach in Learning to Think does not insist on using M for step by step planning. Instead, C can learn to use M’s subroutines (parts of M’s weight matrix) for arbitrary computational purposes but can also learn to ignore M when M is useless and when ignoring M yields better performance. Nevertheless, at least in our present C–M variant, M’s predictions are essential for teaching C, more like in some of the early C–M systems (Schmidhuber, 1990a, b, 1991a), but combined with evolution or black box optimization.
items.zh: 再次注意，然而，《学习思考》中更简单、更稳健的方法并不坚持使用M进行逐步规划。相反，C可以学会使用M的子程序（M权重矩阵的一部分）进行任意计算目的，但也可以学会在M无用且忽略M能带来更好性能时忽略M。尽管如此，至少在我们当前的C-M变体中，M的预测对于教导C至关重要，更像是一些早期C-M系统（Schmidhuber, 1990a, b, 1991a），但结合了进化或黑盒优化。

items.en: By making the temperature τ𝜏\tau an adjustable parameter of the M model, we can see the effect of training the C model on hallucinated virtual environments with different levels of uncertainty, and see how well they transfer over to the actual environment. We experimented with varying the temperature of the virtual environment and observing the resulting average score over 100 random rollouts of the actual environment after training the agent inside of the virtual environment with a given temperature:
items.zh: 通过将温度τ设为M模型的可调参数，我们可以观察在不同不确定性水平的幻觉虚拟环境中训练C模型的效果，并查看它们如何迁移到实际环境。我们尝试改变虚拟环境的温度，并在给定温度下在虚拟环境中训练智能体后，观察实际环境中100次随机回合的平均得分：

items.en: We see that while increasing the temperature of the M model makes it more difficult for the C model to find adversarial policies, increasing it too much will make the virtual environment too difficult for the agent to learn anything, hence in practice it is a hyperparameter we can tune. The temperature also affects the types of strategies the agent discovers. For example, although the best score obtained is 1092 ±plus-or-minus\pm 556 with τ=1.15𝜏1.15\tau=1.15, increasing τ𝜏\tau a notch to 1.30 results in a lower score but at the same time a less risky strategy with a lower variance of returns. For comparison, the best score on the OpenAI Gym leaderboard (Paquette, 2016) is 820 ±plus-or-minus\pm 58.
items.zh: 我们看到，虽然提高M模型的温度使得C模型更难找到对抗性策略，但过度提高会使虚拟环境过于困难，智能体无法学到任何东西，因此在实践中它是一个可以调节的超参数。温度也影响智能体发现的策略类型。例如，尽管最佳得分为1092 ± 556（τ=1.15），但将τ提高到1.30会导致得分降低，但同时策略风险更低，方差更小。作为比较，OpenAI Gym排行榜上的最佳得分为820 ± 58（Paquette, 2016）。

items.en: In our experiments, the tasks are relatively simple, so a reasonable world model can be trained using a dataset collected from a random policy. But what if our environments become more sophisticated? In any difficult environment, only parts of the world are made available to the agent only after it learns how to strategically navigate through its world.
items.zh: 在我们的实验中，任务相对简单，因此可以使用随机策略收集的数据集训练合理的世界模型。但如果我们的环境变得更加复杂呢？在任何困难环境中，只有部分世界在智能体学会如何战略性地导航后才对其可用。

items.en: For more complicated tasks, an iterative training procedure is required. We need our agent to be able to explore its world, and constantly collect new observations so that its world model can be improved and refined over time. An iterative training procedure (Schmidhuber, 2015a) is as follows:
items.zh: 对于更复杂的任务，需要迭代训练过程。我们需要智能体能够探索其世界，并不断收集新的观察结果，以便其世界模型能够随时间改进和完善。迭代训练过程（Schmidhuber, 2015a）如下：

items.en: Initialize M, C with random model parameters.
items.zh: 用随机模型参数初始化 M 和 C。

items.en: Rollout to actual environment N𝑁N times. Save all actions atsubscript𝑎𝑡a_{t} and observations xtsubscript𝑥𝑡x_{t} during rollouts to storage.
items.zh: 在实际环境中执行 N 次 rollout。将 rollout 期间的所有动作 a_t 和观测 x_t 保存到存储中。

items.en: Train M to model P​(xt+1,rt+1,at+1,dt+1|xt,at,ht)𝑃subscript𝑥𝑡1subscript𝑟𝑡1subscript𝑎𝑡1conditionalsubscript𝑑𝑡1subscript𝑥𝑡subscript𝑎𝑡subscriptℎ𝑡P(x_{t+1},r_{t+1},a_{t+1},d_{t+1}|x_{t},a_{t},h_{t}) and train C to optimize expected rewards inside of M.
items.zh: 训练 M 以建模 P(x_{t+1}, r_{t+1}, a_{t+1}, d_{t+1} | x_t, a_t, h_t)，并训练 C 以在 M 内部优化期望奖励。

items.en: Go back to (2) if task has not been completed.
items.zh: 如果任务尚未完成，则返回步骤 (2)。

items.en: We have shown that one iteration of this training loop was enough to solve simple tasks. For more difficult tasks, we need our controller in Step 2 to actively explore parts of the environment that is beneficial to improve its world model. An exciting research direction is to look at ways to incorporate artificial curiosity and intrinsic motivation (Schmidhuber, 2010, 2006, 1991b; Pathak et al., 2017; Oudeyer et al., 2007) and information seeking (Schmidhuber et al., 1994; Gottlieb et al., 2013) abilities in an agent to encourage novel exploration (Lehman & Stanley, 2011). In particular, we can augment the reward function based on improvement in compression quality (Schmidhuber, 2010, 2006, 1991b, 2015a).
items.zh: 我们已经证明，这种训练循环的一次迭代足以解决简单任务。对于更困难的任务，我们需要步骤 2 中的控制器主动探索环境中有利于改进其世界模型的部分。一个令人兴奋的研究方向是研究如何在智能体中融入人工好奇心、内在动机（Schmidhuber, 2010, 2006, 1991b; Pathak et al., 2017; Oudeyer et al., 2007）和信息寻求（Schmidhuber et al., 1994; Gottlieb et al., 2013）能力，以鼓励新颖的探索（Lehman & Stanley, 2011）。特别是，我们可以基于压缩质量的改进来增强奖励函数（Schmidhuber, 2010, 2006, 1991b, 2015a）。

items.en: In the present approach, since M is a MDN-RNN that models a probability distribution for the next frame, if it does a poor job, then it means the agent has encountered parts of the world that it is not familiar with. Therefore we can adapt and reuse M’s training loss function to encourage curiosity. By flipping the sign of M’s loss function in the actual environment, the agent will be encouraged to explore parts of the world that it is not familiar with. The new data it collects may improve the world model.
items.zh: 在当前方法中，由于 M 是一个 MDN-RNN，用于建模下一帧的概率分布，如果其表现不佳，则意味着智能体遇到了环境中不熟悉的部分。因此，我们可以调整并重用 M 的训练损失函数来鼓励好奇心。通过在实际环境中翻转 M 损失函数的符号，智能体将被鼓励探索环境中不熟悉的部分。它收集的新数据可能会改进世界模型。

items.en: The iterative training procedure requires the M model to not only predict the next observation x𝑥x and d​o​n​e𝑑𝑜𝑛𝑒done, but also predict the action and reward for the next time step. This may be required for more difficult tasks. For instance, if our agent needs to learn complex motor skills to walk around its environment, the world model will learn to imitate its own C model that has already learned to walk. After difficult motor skills, such as walking, is absorbed into a large world model with lots of capacity, the smaller C model can rely on the motor skills already absorbed by the world model and focus on learning more higher level skills to navigate itself using the motor skills it had already learned.
items.zh: 迭代训练过程要求 M 模型不仅预测下一个观测 x 和 done，还要预测下一个时间步的动作和奖励。这对于更困难的任务可能是必需的。例如，如果我们的智能体需要学习复杂的运动技能以在其环境中行走，世界模型将学习模仿其自身已经学会行走的 C 模型。在诸如行走等困难运动技能被吸收到具有大量容量的大型世界模型之后，较小的 C 模型可以依赖世界模型已经吸收的运动技能，并专注于学习更高级的技能，以利用其已学会的运动技能进行导航。

items.capEn: Figure 19: How information becomes memory.
items.capZh: 图 19：信息如何成为记忆。

items.en: An interesting connection to the neuroscience literature is the work on hippocampal replay that examines how the brain replays recent experiences when an animal rests or sleeps. Replaying recent experiences plays an important role in memory consolidation (Foster, 2017) – where hippocampus-dependent memories become independent of the hippocampus over a period of time. As (Foster, 2017) puts it, replay is less like dreaming and more like thought. We invite readers to read Replay Comes of Age (Foster, 2017) for a detailed overview of replay from a neuroscience perspective with connections to theoretical reinforcement learning.
items.zh: 与神经科学文献的一个有趣联系是关于海马回放的研究，该研究探讨了当动物休息或睡眠时，大脑如何回放最近的经历。回放最近的经历在记忆巩固中起着重要作用（Foster, 2017）——海马依赖的记忆在一段时间后变得不依赖海马。正如 Foster（2017）所说，回放更像思考而非做梦。我们邀请读者阅读《Replay Comes of Age》（Foster, 2017），以从神经科学角度详细了解回放及其与理论强化学习的联系。

items.en: Iterative training could allow the C–M model to develop a natural hierarchical way to learn. Recent works about self-play in RL (Sukhbaatar et al., 2017; Bansal et al., 2017; Al-Shedivat et al., 2017) and PowerPlay (Schmidhuber, 2013; Srivastava et al., 2012) also explores methods that lead to a natural curriculum learning (Schmidhuber, 2002), and we feel this is one of the more exciting research areas of reinforcement learning.
items.zh: 迭代训练可以使 C-M 模型发展出自然的层次化学习方式。最近关于强化学习中自我对弈（Sukhbaatar et al., 2017; Bansal et al., 2017; Al-Shedivat et al., 2017）和 PowerPlay（Schmidhuber, 2013; Srivastava et al., 2012）的工作也探索了导致自然课程学习（Schmidhuber, 2002）的方法，我们认为这是强化学习中最令人兴奋的研究领域之一。

items.en: There is extensive literature on learning a dynamics model, and using this model to train a policy. Many concepts first explored in the 1980s for feed-forward neural networks (FNNs) (Werbos, 1987; Munro, 1987; Robinson & Fallside, 1989; Werbos, 1989; Nguyen & Widrow, 1989) and in the 1990s for RNNs (Schmidhuber, 1990a, b, 1991a, c) laid some of the groundwork for Learning to Think (Schmidhuber, 2015a). The more recent PILCO (Deisenroth & Rasmussen, 2011; Duvenaud, 2016; McAllister & Rasmussen, 2016) is a probabilistic model-based search policy method designed to solve difficult control problems. Using data collected from the environment, PILCO uses a Gaussian process (GP) model to learn the system dynamics, and then uses this model to sample many trajectories in order to train a controller to perform a desired task, such as swinging up a pendulum, or riding a unicycle.
items.zh: 关于学习动力学模型并使用该模型训练策略的文献非常丰富。许多概念最早在 1980 年代针对前馈神经网络（FNN）（Werbos, 1987; Munro, 1987; Robinson & Fallside, 1989; Werbos, 1989; Nguyen & Widrow, 1989）以及 1990 年代针对 RNN（Schmidhuber, 1990a, b, 1991a, c）进行了探索，为《Learning to Think》（Schmidhuber, 2015a）奠定了基础。最近的 PILCO（Deisenroth & Rasmussen, 2011; Duvenaud, 2016; McAllister & Rasmussen, 2016）是一种基于概率模型的搜索策略方法，旨在解决困难的控制问题。PILCO 使用从环境收集的数据，通过高斯过程（GP）模型学习系统动力学，然后利用该模型采样许多轨迹，以训练控制器执行所需任务，例如摆动钟摆或骑独轮车。

items.capEn: Figure 20: A controller with internal RNN model of the world (Schmidhuber, 1990a).
items.capZh: 图 20：具有内部 RNN 世界模型的控制器（Schmidhuber, 1990a）。

items.en: While Gaussian processes work well with a small set of low dimension data, their computational complexity makes them difficult to scale up to model a large history of high dimensional observations. Other recent works (Gal et al., 2016; Depeweg et al., 2016) use Bayesian neural networks instead of GPs to learn a dynamics model. These methods have demonstrated promising results on challenging control tasks (Hein et al., 2017), where the states are known and well defined, and the observation is relatively low dimensional. Here we are interested in modelling dynamics observed from high dimensional visual data where our input is a sequence of raw pixel frames.
items.zh: 虽然高斯过程在处理小规模低维数据时表现良好，但其计算复杂性使其难以扩展到建模大量高维观测的历史。其他近期工作（Gal et al., 2016; Depeweg et al., 2016）使用贝叶斯神经网络代替 GP 来学习动力学模型。这些方法在具有挑战性的控制任务上展示了有希望的结果（Hein et al., 2017），其中状态已知且定义明确，观测维度相对较低。这里我们感兴趣的是从高维视觉数据中建模动力学，其中输入是原始像素帧序列。

items.en: In robotic control applications, the ability to learn the dynamics of a system from observing only camera-based video inputs is a challenging but important problem. Early work on RL for active vision trained an FNN to take the current image frame of a video sequence to predict the next frame (Schmidhuber & Huber, 1991), and use this predictive model to train a fovea-shifting control network trying to find targets in a visual scene. To get around the difficulty of training a dynamical model to learn directly from high-dimensional pixel images, researchers explored using neural networks to first learn a compressed representation of the video frames. Recent work along these lines (Wahlström et al., 2014, 2015) was able to train controllers using the bottleneck hidden layer of an autoencoder as low-dimensional feature vectors to control a pendulum from pixel inputs. Learning a model of the dynamics from a compressed latent space enable RL algorithms to be much more data-efficient (Finn et al., 2015; Watter et al., 2015; Finn, 2017). We invite readers to watch Finn’s lecture on Model-Based RL (Finn, 2017) to learn more.
items.zh: 在机器人控制应用中，仅通过观察基于摄像头的视频输入来学习系统动力学是一个具有挑战性但重要的问题。早期关于主动视觉的强化学习工作训练了一个 FNN，以获取视频序列的当前图像帧并预测下一帧（Schmidhuber & Huber, 1991），并利用该预测模型训练一个控制网络来移动注视点，以在视觉场景中寻找目标。为了克服直接从高维像素图像训练动力学模型的困难，研究人员探索了使用神经网络首先学习视频帧的压缩表示。沿着这些思路的近期工作（Wahlström et al., 2014, 2015）能够使用自编码器的瓶颈隐藏层作为低维特征向量，从像素输入控制钟摆。从压缩潜在空间学习动力学模型使强化学习算法能够更加数据高效（Finn et al., 2015; Watter et al., 2015; Finn, 2017）。我们邀请读者观看 Finn 关于基于模型的强化学习的讲座（Finn, 2017）以了解更多。

items.en: Video game environments are also popular in model-based RL research as a testbed for new ideas. (Matthew Guzdial, 2017) used a feed-forward convolutional neural network (CNN) to learn a forward simulation model of a video game. Learning to predict how different actions affect future states in the environment is useful for game-play agents, since if our agent can predict what happens in the future given its current state and action, it can simply select the best action that suits its goal. This has been demonstrated not only in early work (Nguyen & Widrow, 1989; Schmidhuber & Huber, 1991) (when compute was a million times more expensive than today) but also in recent studies (Dosovitskiy & Koltun, 2016) on several competitive VizDoom environments.
items.zh: 视频游戏环境在基于模型的强化学习研究中也作为新思想的试验平台而流行。（Matthew Guzdial, 2017）使用前馈卷积神经网络（CNN）学习视频游戏的前向模拟模型。学习预测不同动作如何影响环境中的未来状态对于游戏智能体很有用，因为如果我们的智能体能够根据当前状态和动作预测未来会发生什么，它就可以简单地选择最适合其目标的最佳动作。这不仅在早期工作（Nguyen & Widrow, 1989; Schmidhuber & Huber, 1991）（当时算力比现在贵一百万倍）中得到了证明，而且在最近关于多个竞争性 VizDoom 环境的研究（Dosovitskiy & Koltun, 2016）中也得到了证明。

items.en: The works mentioned above use FNNs to predict the next video frame. We may want to use models that can capture longer term time dependencies. RNNs are powerful models suitable for sequence modelling (Graves, 2013). In a lecture called Hallucination with RNNs (Graves, 2015), Graves demonstrated the ability of RNNs to learn a probabilistic model of Atari game environments. He trained RNNs to learn the structure of such a game and then showed that they can hallucinate similar game levels on its own.
items.zh: 上述工作使用 FNN 来预测下一视频帧。我们可能希望使用能够捕获更长时域依赖性的模型。RNN 是适用于序列建模的强大模型（Graves, 2013）。在题为《Hallucination with RNNs》（Graves, 2015）的讲座中，Graves 展示了 RNN 学习 Atari 游戏环境概率模型的能力。他训练 RNN 学习此类游戏的结构，然后展示了它们可以自行产生类似的游戏关卡。

items.en: Using RNNs to develop internal models to reason about the future has been explored as early as 1990 in a paper called Making the World Differentiable (Schmidhuber, 1990a), and then further explored in (Schmidhuber, 1990b, 1991a, c). A more recent paper called Learning to Think (Schmidhuber, 2015a) presented a unifying framework for building a RNN-based general problem solver that can learn a world model of its environment and also learn to reason about the future using this model. Subsequent works have used RNN-based models to generate many frames into the future (Chiappa et al., 2017; Oh et al., 2015; Denton & Birodkar, 2017), and also as an internal model to reason about the future (Silver et al., 2016; Weber et al., 2017; Watters et al., 2017).
items.zh: 使用 RNN 开发内部模型以推理未来早在 1990 年的一篇论文《Making the World Differentiable》（Schmidhuber, 1990a）中就已探索，随后在（Schmidhuber, 1990b, 1991a, c）中进一步探索。最近一篇题为《Learning to Think》（Schmidhuber, 2015a）的论文提出了一个统一框架，用于构建基于 RNN 的通用问题求解器，该求解器可以学习其环境的世界模型，并学习使用该模型推理未来。后续工作使用基于 RNN 的模型生成未来多帧（Chiappa et al., 2017; Oh et al., 2015; Denton & Birodkar, 2017），并作为内部模型推理未来（Silver et al., 2016; Weber et al., 2017; Watters et al., 2017）。

items.en: In this work, we used evolution strategies to train our controller, as it offers many benefits. For instance, we only need to provide the optimizer with the final cumulative reward, rather than the entire history. ES is also easy to parallelize – we can launch many instances of rollout with different solutions to many workers and quickly compute a set of cumulative rewards in parallel. Recent works (Fernando et al., 2017; Salimans et al., 2017; Ha, 2017b; Stanley & Clune, 2017) have confirmed that ES is a viable alternative to traditional Deep RL methods on many strong baselines.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们使用进化策略来训练控制器，因为它提供了许多好处。例如，我们只需要向优化器提供最终的累积奖励，而不是整个历史。ES 也易于并行化——我们可以启动许多具有不同解决方案的 rollout 实例到多个工作节点，并快速并行计算一组累积奖励。近期工作（Fernando et al., 2017; Salimans et al., 2017; Ha, 2017b; Stanley & Clune, 2017）已证实 ES 是传统深度强化学习方法在许多强基线任务上的可行替代方案。

items.en: Before the popularity of Deep RL methods (Mnih et al., 2013), evolution-based algorithms have been shown to be effective at solving RL tasks (Stanley & Miikkulainen, 2002; Gomez et al., 2008; Gomez & Schmidhuber, 2005; Gauci & Stanley, 2010; Sehnke et al., 2010; Miikkulainen, 2013). Evolution-based algorithms have even been able to solve difficult RL tasks from high dimensional pixel inputs (Koutnik et al., 2013; Hausknecht et al., 2013; Parker & Bryant, 2012). More recent works (Alvernaz & Togelius, 2017) combine VAE and ES, which is similar to our approach.
items.zh: 在深度强化学习方法（Mnih et al., 2013）流行之前，基于进化的算法已被证明能有效解决强化学习任务（Stanley & Miikkulainen, 2002; Gomez et al., 2008; Gomez & Schmidhuber, 2005; Gauci & Stanley, 2010; Sehnke et al., 2010; Miikkulainen, 2013）。基于进化的算法甚至能够从高维像素输入解决困难的强化学习任务（Koutnik et al., 2013; Hausknecht et al., 2013; Parker & Bryant, 2012）。更多近期工作（Alvernaz & Togelius, 2017）将 VAE 和 ES 结合，这与我们的方法类似。

items.capEn: Figure 21: Ancient drawing (1990) of a RNN-based controller interacting with an environment (Schmidhuber, 1990a).
items.capZh: 图 21：1990 年关于 RNN 控制器与环境交互的古老绘图（Schmidhuber, 1990a）。

items.en: We have demonstrated the possibility of training an agent to perform tasks entirely inside of its simulated latent space dream world. This approach offers many practical benefits. For instance, running computationally intensive game engines require using heavy compute resources for rendering the game states into image frames, or calculating physics not immediately relevant to the game. We may not want to waste cycles training an agent in the actual environment, but instead train the agent as many times as we want inside its simulated environment. Training agents in the real world is even more expensive, so world models that are trained incrementally to simulate reality may prove to be useful for transferring policies back to the real world. Our approach may complement sim2real approaches outlined in (Bousmalis et al., 2017; Higgins et al., 2017).
items.zh: 我们证明了在模拟的潜在空间梦境中完全训练智能体执行任务的可能性。这种方法提供了许多实际好处。例如，运行计算密集型游戏引擎需要消耗大量算力来将游戏状态渲染成图像帧，或计算与游戏不直接相关的物理。我们可能不想浪费周期在实际环境中训练智能体，而是希望在其模拟环境中尽可能多次地训练智能体。在现实世界中训练智能体更加昂贵，因此逐步训练以模拟现实的世界模型可能有助于将策略迁移回现实世界。我们的方法可能补充（Bousmalis 等人，2017；Higgins 等人，2017）中概述的 sim2real 方法。

items.en: Furthermore, we can take advantage of deep learning frameworks to accelerate our world model simulations using GPUs in a distributed environment. The benefit of implementing the world model as a fully differentiable recurrent computation graph also means that we may be able to train our agents in the dream directly using the backpropagation algorithm to fine-tune its policy to maximize an objective function (Schmidhuber, 1990a, b, 1991a).
items.zh: 此外，我们可以利用深度学习框架，在分布式环境中使用 GPU 加速我们的世界模型模拟。将世界模型实现为完全可微的循环计算图的好处还意味着，我们可以直接在梦境中使用反向传播算法训练智能体，以微调其策略来最大化目标函数（Schmidhuber，1990a, b, 1991a）。

items.en: The choice of using a VAE for the V model and training it as a standalone model also has its limitations, since it may encode parts of the observations that are not relevant to a task. After all, unsupervised learning cannot, by definition, know what will be useful for the task at hand. For instance, it reproduced unimportant detailed brick tile patterns on the side walls in the Doom environment, but failed to reproduce task-relevant tiles on the road in the Car Racing environment. By training together with a M model that predicts rewards, the VAE may learn to focus on task-relevant areas of the image, but the tradeoff here is that we may not be able to reuse the VAE effectively for new tasks without retraining.
items.zh: 选择使用 VAE 作为 V 模型并将其作为独立模型训练也有其局限性，因为它可能编码与任务无关的观测部分。毕竟，无监督学习无法事先知道什么对当前任务有用。例如，它在 Doom 环境中重现了侧墙上不重要的详细砖块图案，但在 Car Racing 环境中未能重现任务相关的路面瓷砖。通过与预测奖励的 M 模型一起训练，VAE 可能学会关注图像中与任务相关的区域，但这里的权衡是，如果不重新训练，我们可能无法有效地将 VAE 用于新任务。

items.en: Learning task-relevant features has connections to neuroscience as well. Primary sensory neurons are released from inhibition when rewards are received, which suggests that they generally learn task-relevant features, rather than just any features, at least in adulthood (Pi et al., 2013).
items.zh: 学习任务相关特征也与神经科学有关。当收到奖励时，初级感觉神经元会从抑制中释放出来，这表明它们通常学习任务相关特征，而不仅仅是任何特征，至少在成年期如此（Pi 等人，2013）。

items.en: Another concern is the limited capacity of our world model. While modern storage devices can store large amounts of historical data generated using the iterative training procedure, our LSTM (Hochreiter & Schmidhuber, 1997; Gers et al., 2000)-based world model may not be able to store all of the recorded information inside its weight connections. While the human brain can hold decades and even centuries of memories to some resolution (Bartol et al., 2015), our neural networks trained with backpropagation have more limited capacity and suffer from issues such as catastrophic forgetting (Ratcliff, 1990; French, 1994; Kirkpatrick et al., 2016). Future work may explore replacing the small MDN-RNN network with higher capacity models (Shazeer et al., 2017; Ha et al., 2016; Suarez, 2017; van den Oord et al., 2016; Vaswani et al., 2017), or incorporating an external memory module (Gemici et al., 2017), if we want our agent to learn to explore more complicated worlds.
items.zh: 另一个问题是世界模型的容量有限。虽然现代存储设备可以存储使用迭代训练过程生成的大量历史数据，但我们基于 LSTM（Hochreiter & Schmidhuber，1997；Gers 等人，2000）的世界模型可能无法将所有记录的信息存储在其权重连接中。虽然人脑可以以一定分辨率保存数十年甚至数百年的记忆（Bartol 等人，2015），但我们使用反向传播训练的神经网络容量更有限，并且存在灾难性遗忘等问题（Ratcliff，1990；French，1994；Kirkpatrick 等人，2016）。未来的工作可以探索用更高容量的模型（Shazeer 等人，2017；Ha 等人，2016；Suarez，2017；van den Oord 等人，2016；Vaswani 等人，2017）替换小型 MDN-RNN 网络，或者加入外部记忆模块（Gemici 等人，2017），如果我们希望智能体学会探索更复杂的世界。

items.en: Like early RNN-based C–M systems (Schmidhuber, 1990a, b, 1991a, c), ours simulates possible futures time step by time step, without profiting from human-like hierarchical planning or abstract reasoning, which often ignores irrelevant spatial-temporal details. However, the more general Learning To Think (Schmidhuber, 2015a) approach is not limited to this rather naive approach. Instead it allows a recurrent C to learn to address subroutines of the recurrent M, and reuse them for problem solving in arbitrary computable ways, e.g., through hierarchical planning or other kinds of exploiting parts of M’s program-like weight matrix. A recent One Big Net (Schmidhuber, 2018) extension of the C–M approach collapses C and M into a single network, and uses PowerPlay-like (Schmidhuber, 2013; Srivastava et al., 2012) behavioural replay (where the behaviour of a teacher net is compressed into a student net (Schmidhuber, 1992)) to avoid forgetting old prediction and control skills when learning new ones. Experiments with those more general approaches are left for future work.
items.zh: 与早期的基于 RNN 的 C-M 系统（Schmidhuber，1990a, b, 1991a, c）一样，我们的系统逐步模拟可能的未来，没有利用类似人类的层次规划或抽象推理，后者通常忽略无关的时空细节。然而，更通用的“学会思考”（Learning To Think）方法（Schmidhuber，2015a）并不局限于这种相当朴素的方法。相反，它允许循环 C 学会寻址循环 M 的子程序，并以任意可计算的方式重用它们来解决问题，例如通过层次规划或其他利用 M 的类程序权重矩阵部分的方式。最近提出的“一个大网络”（One Big Net）方法（Schmidhuber，2018）将 C-M 方法中的 C 和 M 合并为一个单一网络，并使用类似 PowerPlay（Schmidhuber，2013；Srivastava 等人，2012）的行为重放（其中教师网络的行为被压缩到学生网络中（Schmidhuber，1992））来避免在学习新技能时忘记旧的预测和控制技能。这些更通用方法的实验留待未来工作。
