items.en: In this section we will describe in more details the models and training methods used in this work.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们将更详细地描述本工作中使用的模型和训练方法。

items.capEn: Figure 22: Description of tensor shapes at each layer of ConvVAE.
items.capZh: 图 22：ConvVAE 各层的张量形状描述。

items.en: We trained a Convolutional Variational Autoencoder (ConvVAE) model as the V Model of our agent. Unlike vanilla autoencoders, enforcing a Gaussian prior over the latent vector z𝑧z also limits the amount of information capacity for compressing each frame, but this Gaussian prior also makes the world model more robust to unrealistic z𝑧z vectors generated by the M Model.
items.zh: 我们训练了一个卷积变分自编码器（ConvVAE）模型作为智能体的 V 模型。与普通自编码器不同，对潜在向量 z 施加高斯先验也限制了压缩每帧的信息容量，但这一高斯先验也使世界模型对 M 模型生成的不切实际的 z 向量更加鲁棒。

items.en: As the environment may give us observations as high dimensional pixel images, we first resize each image to 64x64 pixels before and use this resized image as the V Model’s observation. Each pixel is stored as three floating point values between 0 and 1 to represent each of the RGB channels. The ConvVAE takes in this 64x64x3 input tensor and passes this data through 4 convolutional layers to encode it into low dimension vectors μ𝜇\mu and σ𝜎\sigma, each of size Nzsubscript𝑁𝑧N_{z}. The latent vector z𝑧z is sampled from the Gaussian prior N​(μ,σ​I)𝑁𝜇𝜎𝐼N(\mu,\sigma I). In the Car Racing task, Nzsubscript𝑁𝑧N_{z} is 32 while for the Doom task Nzsubscript𝑁𝑧N_{z} is 64. The latent vector z𝑧z is passed through 4 of deconvolution layers used to decode and reconstruct the image.
items.zh: 由于环境可能以高维像素图像的形式提供观测，我们首先将每张图像调整为 64x64 像素，并将此调整后的图像作为 V 模型的观测。每个像素存储为三个介于 0 和 1 之间的浮点值，分别代表 RGB 通道。ConvVAE 接收这个 64x64x3 的输入张量，并通过 4 个卷积层将其编码为低维向量 μ 和 σ，每个的大小为 N_z。潜在向量 z 从高斯先验 N(μ, σI) 中采样。在 Car Racing 任务中，N_z 为 32，而在 Doom 任务中，N_z 为 64。潜在向量 z 通过 4 个反卷积层用于解码和重建图像。

items.en: Each convolution and deconvolution layer uses a stride of 2. The layers are indicated in the diagram in Italics as Activation-type Output Channels x Filter Size. All convolutional and deconvolutional layers use relu activations except for the output layer as we need the output to be between 0 and 1. We trained the model for 1 epoch over the data collected from a random policy, using L2superscript𝐿2L^{2} distance between the input image and the reconstruction to quantify the reconstruction loss we optimize for, in addition to KL loss.
items.zh: 每个卷积层和反卷积层使用步长为 2。层在图中以斜体表示为“激活类型-输出通道数 x 滤波器大小”。所有卷积层和反卷积层使用 relu 激活，但输出层除外，因为我们需要输出介于 0 和 1 之间。我们使用随机策略收集的数据对模型训练了 1 个 epoch，使用输入图像与重建图像之间的 L2 距离来量化我们优化的重建损失，此外还有 KL 损失。

items.en: For the M Model, we use an LSTM (Hochreiter & Schmidhuber, 1997) recurrent neural network combined with a Mixture Density Network (Bishop, 1994) as the output layer. We use this network to model the probability distribution of the next z𝑧z in the next time step as a Mixture of Gaussian distribution. This approach is very similar to (Graves, 2013) in the Unconditional Handwriting Generation section and also the decoder-only section of SketchRNN (Ha & Eck, 2017). The only difference in the approach used is that we did not model the correlation parameter between each element of z𝑧z, and instead had the MDN-RNN output a diagonal covariance matrix of a factored Gaussian distribution.
items.zh: 对于 M 模型，我们使用 LSTM（Hochreiter & Schmidhuber，1997）循环神经网络，结合混合密度网络（Bishop，1994）作为输出层。我们使用该网络将下一时间步的下一 z 的概率分布建模为高斯混合分布。这种方法与（Graves，2013）中的无条件手写生成部分以及 SketchRNN（Ha & Eck，2017）的仅解码器部分非常相似。所用方法的唯一区别是，我们没有对 z 各元素之间的相关性参数进行建模，而是让 MDN-RNN 输出一个对角协方差矩阵，表示因子化高斯分布。

items.capEn: Figure 23: MDN-RNN decoder similar to (Graves, 2013; Ha & Eck, 2017)
items.capZh: 图 23：类似于（Graves，2013；Ha & Eck，2017）的 MDN-RNN 解码器。

items.en: Unlike the handwriting and sketch generation works, rather than using the MDN-RNN to model the pdf of the next pen stroke, we model instead the pdf of the next latent vector z𝑧z. We would sample from this pdf at each time step to generate the hallucinated environments. In the Doom task, we also also use the MDN-RNN to predict the probability of whether the agent has died in this frame. If that probability is above 50%, then we set done to be true in the virtual environment. Given that death is a low probability event at each time step, we find the cutoff approach to more stable compared to sampling from the Bernoulli distribution.
items.zh: 与手写和草图生成工作不同，我们不是使用 MDN-RNN 对下一笔画的概率密度函数进行建模，而是对下一潜在向量 z 的概率密度函数进行建模。我们会在每个时间步从该概率密度函数中采样，以生成幻觉环境。在 Doom 任务中，我们还使用 MDN-RNN 预测智能体是否在该帧中死亡的概率。如果该概率超过 50%，则我们在虚拟环境中将 done 设置为 true。鉴于死亡在每个时间步是低概率事件，我们发现截止方法比从伯努利分布中采样更稳定。

items.en: The MDN-RNNs were trained for 20 epochs on the data collected from a random policy agent. In the Car Racing task, the LSTM used 256 hidden units, while the Doom task used 512 hidden units. In both tasks, we used 5 Gaussian mixtures and did not model the correlation ρ𝜌\rho parameter, hence z𝑧z is sampled from a factored mixture of Gaussian distribution.
items.zh: MDN-RNN 在随机策略智能体收集的数据上训练了 20 个 epoch。在 Car Racing 任务中，LSTM 使用 256 个隐藏单元，而 Doom 任务使用 512 个隐藏单元。在两个任务中，我们使用了 5 个高斯混合，并且没有对相关性参数 ρ 进行建模，因此 z 从因子化的混合高斯分布中采样。

items.en: When training the MDN-RNN using teacher forcing from the recorded data, we store a pre-computed set of μ𝜇\mu and σ𝜎\sigma for each of the frames, and sample an input z∼N​(μ,σ)similar-to𝑧𝑁𝜇𝜎z\sim N(\mu,\sigma) each time we construct a training batch, to prevent overfitting our MDN-RNN to a specific sampled z𝑧z.
items.zh: 当使用教师强制从记录数据训练 MDN-RNN 时，我们为每帧存储预计算的 μ 和 σ 集合，并在每次构建训练批次时采样输入 z ~ N(μ, σ)，以防止 MDN-RNN 过拟合到特定的采样 z。

items.en: For both environments, we applied tanh\tanh nonlinearities to clip and bound the action space to the appropriate ranges. For instance, in the Car Racing task, the steering wheel has a range from -1 to 1, the acceleration pedal from 0 to 1, and the brakes from 0 to 1. In the Doom environment, we converted the discrete actions into a continuous action space between -1 to 1, and divided this range into thirds to indicate whether the agent is moving left, staying where it is, or moving to the right. We would give the C Model a feature vector as its input, consisting of z𝑧z and the hidden state of the MDN-RNN. In the Car Racing task, this hidden state is the output vector hℎh of the LSTM, while for the Doom task it is both the cell vector c𝑐c and the output vector hℎh of the LSTM.
items.zh: 对于这两个环境，我们应用了 tanh 非线性函数来裁剪并将动作空间限制在适当范围内。例如，在赛车任务中，方向盘的范围是 -1 到 1，油门踏板是 0 到 1，刹车也是 0 到 1。在 Doom 环境中，我们将离散动作转换为 -1 到 1 之间的连续动作空间，并将该范围分成三份，分别表示智能体向左移动、保持不动或向右移动。我们将特征向量作为 C 模型的输入，该特征向量由 z 和 MDN-RNN 的隐藏状态组成。在赛车任务中，隐藏状态是 LSTM 的输出向量 h，而在 Doom 任务中，则是 LSTM 的细胞向量 c 和输出向量 h。

items.en: We used Covariance-Matrix Adaptation Evolution Strategy (CMA-ES) (Hansen, 2016) to evolve the weights for our C Model. Following the approach described in Evolving Stable Strategies (Ha, 2017b), we used a population size of 64, and had each agent perform the task 16 times with different initial random seeds. The fitness value for the agent is the average cumulative reward of the 16 random rollouts. The diagram below charts the best performer, worst performer, and mean fitness of the population of 64 agents at each generation:
items.zh: 我们使用协方差矩阵自适应进化策略（CMA-ES）（Hansen, 2016）来进化 C 模型的权重。遵循《进化稳定策略》（Ha, 2017b）中描述的方法，我们使用种群大小为 64，每个智能体使用不同的初始随机种子执行任务 16 次。智能体的适应度值是 16 次随机 rollout 的平均累积奖励。下图显示了每一代中 64 个智能体种群的最佳表现者、最差表现者和平均适应度：

items.capEn: Figure 24: Training of CarRacing-v0
items.capZh: 图 24：CarRacing-v0 的训练

items.en: Since the requirement of this environment is to have an agent achieve an average score above 900 over 100 random rollouts, we took the best performing agent at the end of every 25 generations, and tested that agent over 1024 random rollout scenarios to record this average on the red line. After 1800 generations, an agent was able to achieve an average score of 900.46 over 1024 random rollouts. We used 1024 random rollouts rather than 100 because each process of the 64 core machine had been configured to run 16 times already, effectively using a full generation of compute after every 25 generations to evaluate the best agent 1024 times. Below, we plot the results of same agent evaluated over 100 rollouts:
items.zh: 由于该环境的要求是让智能体在 100 次随机 rollout 中获得平均得分超过 900，因此我们每 25 代取一次表现最佳的智能体，并在 1024 次随机 rollout 场景中测试该智能体，以记录红线上的平均值。经过 1800 代后，一个智能体在 1024 次随机 rollout 中实现了 900.46 的平均得分。我们使用 1024 次随机 rollout 而不是 100 次，因为 64 核机器的每个进程已经配置为运行 16 次，实际上每 25 代使用一整代的计算量来评估最佳智能体 1024 次。下面，我们绘制了同一智能体在 100 次 rollout 中的结果：

items.capEn: Figure 25: Histogram of cumulative rewards. Score is 906 ±plus-or-minus\pm 21.
items.capZh: 图 25：累积奖励的直方图。得分为 906 ± 21。

items.en: We also experimented with an agent that has access to only the z𝑧z vector from the VAE, and not letting it see the RNN’s hidden states. We tried 2 variations, where in the first variation, the C Model mapped z𝑧z directly to the action space a𝑎a. In second variation, we attempted to add a hidden layer with 40 t​a​n​h𝑡𝑎𝑛ℎtanh activations between z𝑧z and a𝑎a, increasing the number of model parameters of the C Model to 1443, making it more comparable with the original setup.
items.zh: 我们还尝试了一个只能访问 VAE 的 z 向量而不能看到 RNN 隐藏状态的智能体。我们尝试了两种变体：在第一种变体中，C 模型将 z 直接映射到动作空间 a。在第二种变体中，我们尝试在 z 和 a 之间添加一个包含 40 个 tanh 激活函数的隐藏层，将 C 模型的参数数量增加到 1443，使其与原始设置更具可比性。

items.capEn: Figure 26: When agent sees only ztsubscript𝑧𝑡z_{t}, score is 632 ±plus-or-minus\pm 251.
items.capZh: 图 26：当智能体仅看到 z_t 时，得分为 632 ± 251。

items.capEn: Figure 27: When agent sees only ztsubscript𝑧𝑡z_{t}, with a hidden layer, score is 788 ±plus-or-minus\pm 141.
items.capZh: 图 27：当智能体仅看到 z_t 并带有隐藏层时，得分为 788 ± 141。

items.en: We conducted a similar experiment on the hallucinated Doom environment we called DoomRNN. Please note that we have not actually attempted to train our agent on the actual VizDoom environment, and had only used VizDoom for the purpose of collecting training data using a random policy. DoomRNN is more computationally efficient compared to VizDoom as it only operates in latent space without the need to render a screenshot at each time step, and does not require running the actual Doom game engine.
items.zh: 我们在名为 DoomRNN 的幻觉 Doom 环境中进行了类似的实验。请注意，我们实际上并未尝试在真实的 VizDoom 环境中训练我们的智能体，仅使用 VizDoom 通过随机策略收集训练数据。DoomRNN 在计算上比 VizDoom 更高效，因为它仅在潜在空间中运行，无需在每个时间步渲染屏幕截图，也无需运行实际的 Doom 游戏引擎。

items.capEn: Figure 28: Training of DoomRNN.
items.capZh: 图 28：DoomRNN 的训练。

items.en: In the virtual DoomRNN environment we constructed, we increased the temperature slightly and used τ=1.15𝜏1.15\tau=1.15 to make the agent learn in a more challenging environment. The best agent managed to obtain an average score of 959 over 1024 random rollouts (the highest score of the red line in the diagram). This same agent achieved an average score of 1092 ±plus-or-minus\pm 556 over 100 random rollouts when deployed to the actual DoomTakeCover-v0 (Paquette, 2016) environment.
items.zh: 在我们构建的虚拟 DoomRNN 环境中，我们稍微提高了温度，使用 τ=1.15 使智能体在更具挑战性的环境中学习。最佳智能体在 1024 次随机 rollout 中获得了 959 的平均得分（图中红线的最高分）。当部署到实际的 DoomTakeCover-v0（Paquette, 2016）环境时，同一智能体在 100 次随机 rollout 中获得了 1092 ± 556 的平均得分。

items.capEn: Figure 29: Histogram of time steps survived in the actual VizDoom environment over 100 consecutive trials. Score is 1092 ±plus-or-minus\pm 556.
items.capZh: 图 29：在真实 VizDoom 环境中连续 100 次试验中存活的步数直方图。得分为 1092 ± 556。
